name: Zeughauskeller Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: ½ cup salad dressing (made with about ½ C of good mayonnaise mixed to taste with German-style mustard)
recipeInstructions:
1. Ensure all utensils are clean and scalded before use.
2. Peel and cut the potatoes into uniform pieces.
3. Cook the potatoes until they are just tender, then drain, retaining as much starch as possible.
4. Place the potatoes in a pan and pour boiling stock over them to bring out the starch and bind the potatoes together. Allow to sit for 45 minutes while absorbing the liquid.
5. Chop the parsley and onion finely (to taste) by hand.
6. Add the chopped herbs to the potatoes, tossing gently to combine flavors.
7. Pour the salad dressing over the mixture and toss until well combined.
